Tech, Consumer Discretionary Stocks Fall, Utilities Sector Outperforms On Surprisingly High Inflation, Jobless Claims Data
data.description: Hotter-than-expected inflation & jump in jobless claims weigh on stocks. Tech & consumer discretionary down, utilities up. Inflation dips but core rises.

data.title: Airbus Announces 85 New Orders, Pointers Show Air India Is Purchaser: Report
data.description: Airbus SE reported 50 deliveries and 235 gross orders in Sept 2024, including 85 from Air India. Boeing's Oct deliveries expected to plummet.
